title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLIX. Relics.
content:
How do you do, neighbour?
        Neighbour, how do you do?
            I am pretty well,
        And how does Cousin Sue do?
            She's pretty well,
        And sends her duty to you,
            So does bonnie Nell.
        Good lack, how does she do?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCLIX. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
